basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) Manager - Marketing Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIMB. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIMB Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First-class Graduate with Master's degree (preferably in Business Administration or equivalent) from a reputed Institution.
qualification.details: Manager - Marketing: First-class Graduate with master's degree (preferably in Business Administration or equivalent) from a reputed Institution. Minimum 10 years of experience after master's degree, preferably in marketing.

salary_details.details: Indicative remuneration is ₹14.02 Lakhs per annum, plus additional benefits. Consolidated monthly salary (CTC). Contract is renewable based on satisfactory performance.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIMB Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIMB Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIMB Manager - Marketing recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Manager - Marketing position at IIMB is 24th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a first-class graduate degree along with a master's degree, preferably in Business Administration or an equivalent field, from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for this role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10 years of post-master's degree experience is required, with a preference for experience in marketing roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager - Marketing position?
faq.answer: The indicative remuneration for the Manager - Marketing role is ₹14.02 Lakhs per annum, along with additional benefits. This is a consolidated salary (CTC).

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis. The contract is renewable based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: All applications for the IIMB Manager - Marketing recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the description 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Manager - Marketing position at the Indian Institute of Management Bangalore.

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for the Manager - Marketing position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any age-related criteria.
